browserNameSearchTab: Cloud Classification, Sentinel-2, Europe, Daily, 20m, (2016-present), V1
browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Auxiliary data, Cloud Mask
collectionDescription:
The Cloud Classification (CC) product provides information on the extent of clouds and cloud shadows derived from optical satellite data acquired by the **Sentinel-2** constellation. Cloud detection is performed at a **120m** spatial resolution using the [MAJA software](https://gitlab.orfeo-toolbox.org/maja/maja/).
  
  It is generated in near real-time at European scale, with a pixel spacing of 20 m x 20 m. It used to produce the CLMS High-Resolution Water, Snow and Ice datasets (HR-WSI), which rely on Sentinel-2 imagery.
  
  **Data availability**: from 2016 to the present. No product is generated for a Sentinel-2 tile when cloud cover exceeds 90%. 

  More information in the products documentation [here](https://land.copernicus.eu/en/products/snow/fractional-snow-cover).

layers.shortDescription: Cloud and cloud shadow classification of the Sentinel-2 image
layers.longDescription: Classification of the Sentinel-2 image using the MAJA cloud screening and atmospheric correction software, developed by CNES and CESBIO with contributions from DLR. Cloud detection is performed at a spatial resolution of 120 m.

layers.shortDescription: Quality layer for the cloud and cloud shadow classification (CC) layer
layers.longDescription: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the cloud and cloud shadow classification layer.

Bitmask layer with pixel quality flags. The default visualisation highlights pixels where clouds have been detected using a single-scene, threshold-based approach. These correspond to pixels where bit 0 is activated. Additional information can also be visualised by selecting other bits. More details are available in the </> Custom option.
